Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
195 
GAP_TIER 
LABEL: 
Gap Tier 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the formulary tier has extra coverage in the during the coverage gap phase. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_TIER 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 = Not Applicable 
X = Unknown 
COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2007. The coverage gap is technically referred to as the
